titleStmt.title: SII 38.352: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 352. (A.R. No. 352 of 1912.) DĒVIKĀPURAM, ARNI TALUK, NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT. On the south wall, first prākāra, Bṛihadāmba temple.

p.hi: King: Kṛishṇadēvarāya. Year: Śaka 1442, Bahudānya, Makara, śu. di. 5. Friday, Hasta = January 21, 1519 A.D.

summary.p: Records that the pontiff of Bhīkshā-maḍam Īśānaśivachāriyār, who was also responsible for the treasury of Tirumalar-uḍaiyanayiṉār temple at Dēvakkapuram, tāṉattār (trustees), māyēśvarars (devotees), and kaikkōḷa-mudaḷigaḷ (weaver merchants) conferred the kāṇipaṟṟu rights on Tirumalai-Nāyakkar, son of Eṭṭappa-nāyakkar, the Kaṉṉaḍiya-nāyakkapāḍikal, residing at Marudarasar-paḍaivīḍu, three plots of land in two villages totalling 700 kuḻi of land, of the temple and also one old house at Dēvakkapuram. This inscription also stipulates that he could induct cultivators (kuḍiyēṟṟi) and have them rise any crops he liked on the land which included both wet and dry lands. The land was also authorised to be irrigated by the (local) tank and taxes such as kaḍamai, kāṇikkai, poṉvaṟkam, palatāṉiyavaṟkam, maravaḍai, māvaḍai, vāśalkaḍamai, peṟkaḍamai, taṟikaḍamai, and other taxes were to be remitted to the treasury. The inscription further informs us that the lands thus leased to the donee as maṉaiāṅkaṭṭu-kuttagai, with the condition, that he would have to remit 50 paṇam of money and 50 kalam of paddy as kandāyam to the treasury of Tirumalaruḍaiyanayiṉār temple.
The pontiff of Bhīkshā-maḍam, Chandranambi, the tāṉattār, the temple accountant Īśānabrahmarāyaṉ alias Eṭṭi Appaṉ Uttaṇḍi and others figure as signatories.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu svastiśrī . man mahāmaṇḍalesvara metiṉi micura kaṇṭa kaṭṭāri cāḷuva kiṟuṣṇa(ka) teva mahārāyar piṟutivirācciyam paṇṇi Aruḷāniṉṟa jagā�nttamRead cakāttam 1000 4 100 4 10 2 mel cellā niṉṟa vekutāniyavaruṣam makara nāyaṟṟu
Amara pakṣattu pañcamiyū cukkiṟavāramum peṟṟa Astanakṣatrattu nāḷ ceyaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu palkuṉṟa koṭṭattu mel kuṉṟa nāṭṭu muruka maṅkalapaṟṟu Irācakempīraṉmalaikku Aṭuttappaṟṟu ceyāṟṟukku teṉpirivāṉa tevakkāpuramuṭaiyār
tirumalarvuṭaiya nayiṉār śrībhaṇḍārattukku kaṭavāṉ pikṣāmaṭam Icāṉacivācāriyarum tāṉattārum māyecurarum kaikoḷa mutaliyaḷum Āka Ivvaṉaivarum marutaracarpaṭaiviṭṭilirukkum kaṉṉaṭiya nāyakkapāṭikaḷil nāyakkar Ettappanāyaṉār makaṉār
tirumalai nāyakkaṟku kāṇipaṟṟu paṇṇi kuṭuttapaṭi tevakkapurattu paḻaiya maṉai Oṉṟum murukamaṅkalattu piṟivaānaṟuvili tāṅkal nañcai puñcaikku Ellai murukamaṅkala maṇi Ētuvāyi vayiravaṉ piṟavaṭai Uḷpaṭavum viracampamattarāyaṉ piṟavaṭai Uḷpaṭa ha
poṉṉāṭṭuyaraiyaṉ piṟavaṭai Uḷpaṭavum Ilavaṅkollai tarucukku teṟkku maṇṭapamuṭaiyāṉ kuḷattukku [ keḻakku] cālai marattukku kkeḻakku toṇṭaimāṉ kuḷattukku naṭṭuvaṉ tiruvuṭaiyān kuḷattukku kkekku tevakkapuram Ellaivāyikku vaṭakku
periya mutaliyār koyilukku vaṭakku kuḷakkaraipāṭināṭu ceyivāṉ piṟavaṭaikku vaṭakku kuḷakkaraipāṭi paṟai ce kku [ vaṭakku] Uḷpaṭṭa nañcai puñcaiyiṟ tāṅkalum Uḷpaṭa veṇṭum payirceyitu koḷḷak kaṭavaraākavum kayilāyattil nilapiṟiva
tiṉṟi paraiyaṉtāṅkal kiḻ ti ṉum kaḷar veḷikkukku naraciṅkanallūrmikattu toḷḷi Ellai vāyikku kāṅkayaṉkuppattil piṟavaṭaikku kkekku poneṟu tikṣatar kollaikku kiḻakku cāttanviṟutti nilattukku kiḻakku vaṭakku ciṉṟiparaiyaṉtāṅkal Etuvāyi tevāṇaiyānikku vaṭakku
tāṅkal kiḻai koṭiyum Ēriyil peruvāyikālukku(kku) Ēri melai koṭi cālaimarattukku vaṭakku kāṅkayaṉ kuppaṉ Ellaivāyi kollaikku kkekku Aracūṟparaiyaṉtāṅkal Uḷpaṭṭa nañcai puñcai nāṟkellaiyum Uḷpaṭṭa nilattil ciṉṟi paraiyaṉtāṅkal kiḻ tāṉattār tiruviḷakku
puṟam kuḻi 5 100 kaṇakkapaṭṭi kuḻi 2 100 Āka kuḻi 7 100 Aracūṟ paraiyaṉ tāṅkal kiḻ poreṟu tikṣatar cāttaviṟutti kuḻi 7 100m kollai Oṉṟum nayiṉārtikṣatarpurokittukku kuḻi 7 100 kollai Oṉṟum niṅkalāka nañcai puñcai nāṟkellaiyum Ivarveṇṭum payir ceyitukoṇṭu kuṭiyumēṟṟi
koḷḷa kaṭavarākavum Inta māṉiyam kuḻi 1000 100kku Inta Ēri nir pāyak kaṭavatākavum Inta naṟuvili tāṅkaluciṉṟi paraiyaṉ Aracūṟ paṟaiyanThe letter ‘n’ is engraved below. tāṅkalu IvaruṣamThe letter ‘varuṣam’ stands for varuṣamĀṭimātam � Āka kāṇipaṟṟu Āka kaikoṇṭu veṇṭum payiṟceyitu koḷḷakaṭavarākavum payiṟceyum
Iṭattu kaṭamai kāṇikkai poṉvaṟkam palatāṉiyavaṟkam maravaṭai māvaṭai vāṉpayir puṉpayir vācalkaṭamai peṟkaṭamai taṟikaṭamai paṭṭaṭai nūlāyam cekku kaṭamai Eruttu cammātam cāttukaṭamai mātarikkam talaiārikkam Ācuvakaṭamai palatāṉa
veṭṭivari nallerutu naṟpacu koṇikaivirimuṭṭu kopuravācalil piṟakkum paḻavari putuvari viraraimukam pārvai maṟṟu Eppeṟpaṭṭa cakalavakaiyum Uḷpaṭa maṉai Āṅkaṭṭu kuttakai Āka naṟuvilitāṅkalukku varuṣam Oṉṟukku 1 2 10 5 ḷa 2 1000 5 100 mu ciṉṟiparaiyaṉ Aracūṟparaiyaṉ
tāṅkalukku 2 10 5ḷa 2 1000 5 100mum Āka varuṣam ta kuḻikuḻi is written ‘pe’ 5 10 cūlakālāl ḷa5 1000mum Āka I varuṣamum Eṉṟu Eṉṉūṟ Iccantiraṟātitta varaiyum kāṇipaṟṟu Āka Aṉupavittu koṇṭu Inta paṇam Añpatum nellu Añpatiṉ kalamum tirumalarvuṭaiyanayiṉār śrībhaṉdhārattukkuRead bhaṇḍāº
muta kantāyam Āka varuṣam varuṣam toṟu paṇamum celutti nellum Aḷakka kaṭavarākavum Ēriyumveṭṭivittu tānamThe letter ‘m’ is engraved below the letter ‘pa’ in the next word paṇṇipaṇṇi Erimiṉ vilai Eriyile Iṭak kaṭavatākavum nāṅkaḷ Ivaṟku koyilecuvantiṟam Āka kaṭṭaḷai paṇṇiṉatu nāḷ Oṉṟukku vaṅa Aruciyil
piṟacātamum Oru toṇṭaṉ paṇiyāramum nir piḻiñca cantaṉam palam Oṉṟu Eṉṟeṉṟaikku cantiṟātittavaraiyum naṭatta kaṭavom Ākavum Ippaṭi cammatittu Inta kāṇipaṟṟu paṇṇi kuṭuttom tirumalai nāyakkaṟku tevakkāpurampikṣāmaṭam Icāṉa
civācāriyar Eḻuttu tāṉattār karaiyeṟipaṭṭar cantiranampi Uḷḷiṭṭār Eḻuttu Āḻvārtirumalai nayiṉār Eḻuttu māyecurar tirumalaic civaṉ kaṇkāṇi civaṉ Uḷḷiṭṭār Eḻuttu kaikoḷamutali taḷa Iracukkaḷappāḷar naraciṅkakāliṅkaraāyar naravilaṅkātār cantiranādhaṉ
kollāviṭṭār tampirāṉtoḻar vallāṉai veṉṟār veṭanāyaṉ Uḷḷiṭṭa kaikoḷamutalikaḷ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivarkaḷ colla Eḻutiṉamaikku koyilkaṇakku yicurapiramarāyaṉ Āna Eṭṭiappaṉ Uttaṇṭi Eḻuttu § naṉṟāka śubhamastha .
Digital edition of SII 38.352 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
